## Type of change

- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / maintenance

## Test plan

- [ ] `go fmt ./...`
- [ ] `go vet ./...`
- [ ] `go test ./...`
- [ ] Manual TUI check, if user-facing behavior changed

## Notes

- Does this change affect SSH command construction, Docker command construction, or config parsing?
- Does the README or `examples/config.yaml` need an update?
